title: Clowd's Christmas Food & Hat Pack!
description: Name dependant textures for cooked chicken and carved pumpkins to bring festive items to your world!
body:
A name dependant resource pack for Java, no mods needed, just drag it into your resourcepacks folder. You can rename cooked chicken to get festive food that you can eat or decorate with, and you can also rename carved pumpkins for festive hats or further decor! I will likely add more to this pack in time, suggestions are welcome. Down below are the names needed to rename the items!

**Carved Pumpkin - Hats:**

Santa Hat

Red Cracker Hat

Blue Cracker Hat

Yellow Cracker Hat

**Carved Pumpkin - Decor (can also be worn):**

Christmas Tree

Christmas Cracker

Holly Wreath

Red Present

Green Present

Blue Present

**Cooked Chicken:**

Yule Log

Christmas Pudding

Mince Pie

Gingerbread Man

Standing Gingerbread Man

Gingerbread House

Plated Yule Log

Plated Christmas Pudding

Plated Mince Pie

Plated Gingerbread Man

Plated Gingerbread House
